$source_note: Customer-written concern descriptions gathered from yourmechanic.com question slugs (which encode the customer's verbatim question into the URL). Lightly normalized from URL kebab-case to natural sentences. Each entry's source URL points to the original Q&A page. Compiled 2026-05-17 for the diagnose-concern LLM eval at scripts/eval-diagnose-concern.ts. All concerns are run through the picker's 'Other Issue' pseudo-chip path (no chip hint) — the hardest case for the LLM's classification step.

concerns.text: My brakes all of a sudden started making a grinding loud noise. The grinding continues while driving even when brakes are not applied.
I had front brakes and rotors replaced and now my brakes are squeaking and grinding when I come to a stop.
Brakes making a grinding noise after car is in reverse and put it in drive. Brakes grind for about 2 car lengths then a thud.
Horrible grinding sound after recently replaced front and back brakes and rotors.
When I brake it sounds and feels like grinding metal.
I can hear the grinding sound when I stop and drive again.
Changed front brake pads. After 2 weeks the brakes make a grinding noise at low speeds.
When I brake my steering wheel turns to the right and the car pulls to the left and makes a clunk noise when I let go of the brakes.
Vibration or shaking feeling in seat and steering wheel.
Steering wheel vibration over 60 mph.
I have vibration in the steering wheel and a transmission problem.
Intermittent steering wheel shaking on a 2001 Lexus.
Car shaking and vibrating on the right side while accelerating or at a constant speed.
Exhaust smoke smells like gas or burning oil.
A little bit of white smoke comes from the motor when I get off the highway and come to a complete stop. It smells like burning oil.
Burning oil from the engine and breathing the fumes within the vehicle.
Switched to synthetic oil, now I smell burning oil, possibly engine running hotter.
My 2012 Jeep Liberty has a very strong burning smell. Jeep is not overheating and the check engine light is not on.
I smell something burning and my oil pressure light is on. What's wrong?
Why is all of a sudden the power steering keeps leaking after being fixed? It's happening again for the 4th time causing PS failure.
I am leaking coolant only sometimes. I can't find the leak and it only leaks sometimes.
Radiator fluid poured out on the driveway.
Where is my coolant leaking from? 2007 Dodge Caravan.
Oil on engine with burning smell. Ford Fusion 2011.
Check engine light came on, stayed 2-3 days, then went off.
Car stopped while I was driving it. Check engine light is also on.
Check engine light comes on while driving. It started jerking while driving. Was told it may be the camshaft sensor.
Check engine and ABS light came on then went away.
Check engine light came on while driving. Is this a serious problem? Car seems to be running fine.
Air conditioner blows cold, then warm.
AC blows warm while idling, cools during driving.
AC is not blowing cold and there's a plastic-like smell when AC is on.
My air conditioner blows warm when idle, loses coolant and starts to overheat.
My car pulls hard to the right during acceleration.
My car shakes and the wheel pulls to the right in a jerking motion.
I hit a curb and flat my tire but I had to ride the rim home. I got a new tire but my car pulls to the right and left now.
My car pulls to the side when I leave acceleration and when I'm braking. What could be the real problem?
Popping and clunking sound from the right passenger side front. Front suspension was inspected over the weekend.
Clunking noises driving at low speeds or over bumps.
Banging and rattling noise coming from the front suspension.
White smoke coming from tailpipe with the code for evap large leak.
Smoke coming from the tail pipe when I accelerate. Burning oil.
My truck won't start. I was driving it earlier and a big cloud of white smoke came out of the exhaust and it completely shut off.
My car hesitates when accelerating, especially uphill.
My car hesitates and I have to press on gas hard for it to kind of smooth on out.
Engine stalls when accelerating from idle.
Engine stalls. Then after 5 minutes or so it will start back up.
Car won't start, key turns and lights dim when it cranks. I just don't hear a buzzing sound from the fuel pump when I turn the key to on.
Car completely dead, lights on but are dim, lost power steering and power windows, ABS light and battery light are on.
I hit a pothole and my heat and AC went out. How can I fix it?
